## Problem / motivation

Describe the use case or pain point this feature would address.

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like the new behavior to look like — CLI flags, new API methods, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other tools that do this well?

## Additional context

Any other context, references to the EXIF spec, or examples that might help.
